biography: Olli, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Hirsala Golf and has been a consistent presence in the tournament over the years. With a total of 9 past appearances, Olli brings a wealth of experience to the competition. Known for his calculated approach to the game, Olli secured a Hector Trophée victory, showcasing his ability to perform under pressure and excel in the pairs format.

Beyond team play, Olli's individual skills have also shone brightly, culminating in a well-deserved Victor Trophy win. While Olli will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, his impact on the tournament remains significant.
Off the course, Olli is known among his peers for his, perhaps controversial, admiration for Bryson Dechambeau. You can always find Olli sporting his favorite Bryson Dechambeau cap.
